mnemonics: SIMD = Single Instruction, Multiple Data - diamonds
MIMD = Multiple Instruction, Multiple Data - minds
Cache Coherence = Keep Allocated Cache Together - keepers
Interconnection Networks = Internet for Computers - I's
keyPoints: SIMD systems process data in parallel using a single instruction
MIMD systems process data in parallel using multiple, different instructions
Cache coherence is maintained to prevent data inconsistencies
Shared memory allows multiple processors to access the same memory location
Interconnection networks enable communication between processors
